description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Spack Builds that triggers on push events. Run a job on an ubuntu-22.04 environment with a spack/ubuntu-jammy container, using a matrix strategy to build HiOp with Spack across multiple specs. Checkout the repository with submodules, then set up the Spack environment, add a public mirror, create and activate a Spack environment, add and develop HiOp, concretize dependencies, and install HiOp with Spack.
